description: Composition Cream round neck T-shirt made of 95% viscose cotton and 5% lycra, has short raglan sleeves, graphic print and ruched hem sides Fit Regular Wash care Wash with warm water Do not bleach Use warm iron, do not iron on print arrow women caters to fashionistas with a taste for the exotic. This printed T-shirt is a glamourised version of the oversized tee with its slim silhouette. Pair it with richly hued denims, sky high heels and a vest. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5.8" and chest 33"
